prompt:
Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

Category: In vivo
Case Description: I hope to edit Mouse eye

Please provide your response as follows:
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f):
raw_response:
Thinking and reasoning:
- The user wants an in vivo CRISPR edit in the mouse eye. For in vivo ocular delivery, AAV is the most commonly used and well-established vector because it efficiently transduces retinal cell types after subretinal or intravitreal injection, has low immunogenicity, and enables sustained expression. Other options (plasmid transfection, lentivirus, electroporation, microinjection, LNP) are less practical or less established for in vivo editing of the mouse eye (microinjection is for embryos/zygotes; electroporation and plasmid transfection are generally ex vivo or limited in vivo; LNPs are systemic and not standard for ocular targeting; lentivirus has lower tropism and safety concerns compared to AAV).

Plan (checklist):
1. [ ] Interpret case details (in vivo, mouse eye)
2. [ ] Evaluate delivery method options for ocular in vivo editing
3. [ ] Select the single most relevant method and provide answer

Step 1:
1. [✓] Interpret case details (in vivo, mouse eye) — confirmed the task is in vivo editing targeted to mouse ocular tissues.

Updated plan:
1. [✓] Interpret case details (in vivo, mouse eye)
2. [ ] Evaluate delivery method options for ocular in vivo editing
3. [ ] Select the single most relevant method and provide answer

Step 2:
2. [✓] Evaluate delivery method options for ocular in vivo editing — considered AAV tropism for retina/RPE, established use for subretinal/intravitreal injection, cargo-size considerations (can use smaller Cas variants or split systems), and compared alternatives (plasmid transfection, lentivirus, RNP electroporation/microinjection, LNP).

Updated plan:
1. [✓] Interpret case details (in vivo, mouse eye)
2. [✓] Evaluate delivery method options for ocular in vivo editing
3. [ ] Select the single most relevant method and provide answer

Step 3:
3. [✓] Select the single most relevant method and provide answer — AAV is most appropriate for in vivo mouse eye editing.

Updated plan (final):
1. [✓] Interpret case details (in vivo, mouse eye)
2. [✓] Evaluate delivery method options for ocular in vivo editing
3. [✓] Select the single most relevant method and provide answer

- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f): <solution>f</solution>
